[Read more](https://q-ctrl.com/blog/time-names-q-ctrl-to-its-inaugural-list-honoring-100-industry-leaders-of-2026)
###  Q-CTRL holds the key to the multi-trillion-dollar quantum opportunity
McKinsey calls quantum a $2T market opportunity. Achieving this value is blocked by the divide between the quantum and classical worlds.
We build AI-powered infrastructure software to bridge this gap, delivering performance no one else can match. With this unique capability we’ve focused our business around the twin verticals of quantum computing and quantum sensing.
![Diagram showing Q-CTRL 'AI for Quantum' is made up of human intelligence and physical informed AI. This is feeding into and being fed into by classical computers and quantum devices](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0df/68dda5c516b374339abc014f_Q-CTRL%20AI%20for%20quantum.svg)
## First and only in the world to deliver quantum advantage
Through our unique focus on AI-for-quantum we’ve achieved what no one else can, delivering the first true quantum advantage in GPS-free navigation and setting world records in quantum computer performance.

### The team making quantum technology useful
Through advanced research that leads the field, and a dedicated focus on customer value through our products, we’re committed to delivering the full potential of quantum technology.
[Meet the team](https://q-ctrl.com/about#leadership)
![Q-CTRL team looking at a computer](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0df/68412a2f2bdf10300daff491_Image.avif)
### World-leading research
We solve the toughest problems in quantum technology - hardware error and instability. Through our expertise in quantum control, we are driving major advances from AI automation to compilation, and quantum error correction to software-ruggedized cold-atom quantum sensing.
[Discover our research](https://q-ctrl.com/technical-manuscripts)

###### Case studies
## Real-world use cases
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6656bb3d3ff71e7726c76719_the-australian-army.svg) Optimally routing 120 convoys can take more than a month of classical computation. The Australian Army is evaluating the potential of quantum computing to provide improvements; however, it’s been difficult to validate the feasibility of a quantum solution due to hardware noise. With Fire Opal, an algorithmic enhancement software, we are able to achieve results on quantum computers that build confidence in our quantum roadmap. Marcus Doherty Australian Reserve Officer , Australian Army ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6657f51dc97a8fe7b2cba1c4_65c3133532c26415c16442b9_Q-CTRL%2520Australian%2520Army%2520transport%2520convoy%2520logistics%2520optimization.webp)](https://q-ctrl.com/case-study/improving-army-logistics-with-quantum-computing)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6a02c18d6f7de89c107b85e2_mazda.svg) Working with Q-CTRL gave us a chance to explore a new and fast moving area of technology in a way that was grounded in our real design challenges. The team brought a strong mix of technical expertise and practical focus, helping us understand how quantum machine learning might fit into our workflow. It was a productive and insightful collaboration. Shimoda Wataru (霜田 航) , Mazda Motor Corporation ![Car frames on assembly line in factory with workers in blue uniforms moving around.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/68c8f5e30de467f43a91b838_Mazda_cs_hero.png)](https://q-ctrl.com/case-study/tackling-a-costly-bottleneck-in-automotive-design)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6656bfa78aad81883c4094fa_transport-nsw.svg) A rare opportunity for leading transport innovators and quantum computing experts to tackle complex transport network management and congestion problems. Andrew Constance Minister for Transport and Roads , Transport for NSW ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6657f51b033ec9be516d8b63_65b5cfb723169546f9c64165_transport-of-nsw-case-study-hero.webp)](https://q-ctrl.com/case-study/delivering-quantum-computing-for-faster-commuting)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6a02c4b3ec9e540ff64876f0_MCG.svg) We achieved a significant leap forward in accurately calculating the physical properties of materials, demonstrating a five-fold increase in achievable circuit width over previous Quantum Phase Estimation studies. , Mitsubishi Chemical Group ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6908130704d57c2d0b78c9da_Hero%20image_MCG.png)](https://q-ctrl.com/case-study/unlocking-new-performance-capability-in-quantum-chemistry)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6656bf4fb6389416be2b9078_the-university-of-sydney.svg) Effectively, we store two error-correctable logical qubits in a single trapped ion and demonstrate entanglement between them. We did this using quantum control software developed by Q-CTRL, with a physics-based model to design quantum gates that minimise the distortion of GKP logical qubits, so they maintain the delicate structure of the GKP code while processing quantum information. Vassili Matsos PhD student in the School of Physics and Sydney Nano , The University of Sydney ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/68ad5a926a209063e856bd79_Sydney-uni-quad.jpg)](https://q-ctrl.com/case-study/hardware-efficient-entanglement-with-the-rosetta-stone-of-quantum-codes)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6864d27fc5282cb985806ed5_DC_Logo_Housed_White%201.svg) The easy-to-use, intuitive Black Opal tool allowed our QTAP participants to quickly get up to speed with quantum computing, ready to trial their real-life business use cases. There was also some great material for participants who were curious to learn more about advanced topics. Daniel Goldsmith Senior Quantum Computing Consultant , Digital Catapult ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6864ce89c5282cb9857db196_q-ctrl%20digital%20catapult%20quantum%20computing%20education.png)](https://q-ctrl.com/case-study/preparing-diverse-cohorts-with-black-opal-for-digital-catapults-hybrid-learning-quantum-technology-programme)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/682e97df2bd1290e41aca9e2_NetworkRail.svg) We were pleasantly surprised to see the optimal routing of 26 trains over 18 minutes of real scheduling data for the full station topology being realised on a real quantum device, which otherwise wouldn’t have been possible without using Q-CTRL’s optimisation solver. Nadia Hoodbhoy Principal Engineer , Network Rail ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/682bcd8d24e9f103215c0d8c_Hero%20-%20Behind%20title.png)](https://q-ctrl.com/case-study/accelerating-the-schedule-for-quantum-enhanced-rail)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6a02c09f976ed29bd7ba5e8b_Q-CTRL.svg) We achieved an accuracy in some trials comparable to a sharpshooter hitting a bullseye from 1,000 yards away. But because our quantum-assured navigation system allows a vehicle to position itself accurately irrespective of how far it’s travelled, by analogy that sharpshooter can hit the same bullseye no matter how far away they move from the target. Michael J. Biercuk Founder & Chief Executive Officer , Q-CTRL ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/680f166cf10d2556fd0e772b_16_9-sale-dark-1.png)](https://q-ctrl.com/case-study/q-ctrl-delivering-quantum-advantage-to-airborne-systems)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/67ff00d8a7cb66df5133b5d5_uoh-white.svg) Students who engaged with Black Opal as an active companion resource significantly boosted knowledge retention and ultimately understanding. Some of them even engaged further with quantum computing by choosing a final-year project in that field. Dr David Benoit Senior Lecturer in Molecular Physics and Astrochemistry , University of Hull, UK ![Large ivy-covered brick building with clock tower and people sitting on grass in front under blue sky.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/67f4bc57e953fae9dfd4bdb3_Hull%20Uni%20Hero.png)](https://q-ctrl.com/case-study/improving-quantum-education-outcomes-with-black-opal-at-the-university-of-hull-uk)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6656be91b7cbce6274b57ca8_nord-quantique.svg) Given the complexity of the physics at play, being able to perform closed-loop optimization of a few physically motivated parameters of the quantum error correction protocol with Boulder Opal is very valuable to us. Dany Lachance-Quirion VP of Quantum Hardware , Nord Quantique ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6657f51d57c3143ebb108e12_65c58e9cca3af1fbf3a57bcd_AdobeStock_557924173.webp)](https://q-ctrl.com/case-study/nord-quantique-is-accelerating-the-path-to-useful-quantum-error-correction-with-boulder-opal)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6656bb76a0b1540550b13007_blue-qubits.svg) As we develop novel techniques to solve some of the quantum industry’s hardest challenges, Fire Opal is an essential tool to reduce the impact of hardware noise and demonstrate successful results with deeper and wider circuits. Hayk Tepanyan Chief Technology Officer , BlueQubit ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6657f51d3af40aa43df7a82f_660ca0b80bbd52bf4c9142bf_BlueQubit%2520Q-CTRL.webp)](https://q-ctrl.com/case-study/enabling-data-loading-for-quantum-machine-learning-with-fire-opal)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6667d27189ed7ce9f685bdea_q-ctrl%20partner.svg) We wanted to challenge Fire Opal’s capabilities by running a quite complex, unoptimized circuit. The results were extremely promising. The only comparable results we’ve seen have come from hardware that is currently too expensive to run extensive tests on. Dr. Valtteri Lahtinen Chief Scientific Officer , Q-CTRL Partner ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6667ccda4682941c079f0240_q-ctrl-partners-case-study.webp)](https://q-ctrl.com/case-study/reducing-quantum-compute-costs-2-500x-with-fire-opal)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6656be5049dbae2377dded8b_ibm-quantum.svg) We used Qiskit Pulse and Q-CTRL’s Boulder Opal to run error-robust quantum gates on a five-qubit IBM Quantum Canary processor delivering better value for users , IBM Quantum ![Close-up of blue glowing quantum computer chips with circuit patterns and light streaks.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6657f51bbb76a1a4fdd5147d_65b5caaa3061e1aff3edde95_ibm-quantum-case-sudy-hero.webp)](https://q-ctrl.com/case-study/making-quantum-logic-10x-better-on-quantum-computers)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6656bf0950c71acd324fe6ec_rigetti.svg) Q-CTRL’s work has the potential to significantly improve algorithmic performance and hardware stability in quantum processors. Alex Hill Director, Quantum Engineering , Rigetti ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6657f51bb0ed2035fbf46a02_65b5cf4321078c5d278efa5d_rigetti-case-study-hero.webp)](https://q-ctrl.com/case-study/improving-robustness-to-quantum-logic-calibration-errors-by-7x)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6656bf4fb6389416be2b9078_the-university-of-sydney.svg) Collaboration between experimentalists at University of Sydney and quantum control engineers at Q-CTRL breakthrough result published in Physical Review Letters Dr. Cornelius Hempel Research Fellow , The University of Sydney ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6657f51c4421cfbcfbcfb48d_65710ed5fab68d134b857a95_ethan-shi-h0SCuYQc1NY-unsplash.webp)](https://q-ctrl.com/case-study/making-sense-of-quantum-noise-with-machine-learning)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/665417a6d291c5d044405f63_northwestern-university.svg) The breadth and flexibility of Boulder Opal allowed us to create our own optimization scenario and obtain pulses robust to the five most relevant experimental noise sources at the same time! This will be crucial in the development of atomic interferometers to detect dark matter and gravitational waves at currently unexplored frequencies. Zilin Chen Postdoc , Northwestern University ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6657f51cb21379c2ab0332bc_65b5c98ba0e2af577b59f315_northwestern-case-study-hero.webp)](https://q-ctrl.com/case-study/northwestern-looks-to-the-heart-of-the-universe-with-robust-quantum-sensors)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/665417906a621685419e74ca_advanced-navigation.svg) Autonomous quantum sensors in space exploration will be invaluable in leveraging extraterrestrial resources for permanent human bases on the Moon and Mars. Steven Marshall Premier of South Australia , Advanced Navigation ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6657f51b7c9967f1088dd4bd_65b5ca29fe1ff665b84fdaf2_advance-navigation-case-study-hero.webp)](https://q-ctrl.com/case-study/developing-a-quantum-assured-navigation-solution)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/665417b46a621685419e8f9c_chalmers.svg) It was really easy to go from code to experiments. I started from the relevant notebook in the documentation, followed the steps, adapted when necessary, and it simply worked! We’re now using Q-CTRL pulses that allow us to cut the time of our gates by eight times. Marina Kudra PhD Student , Chalmers University of Technology ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0fe/6657f51b185a36836fc8850f_65b5c94d4b8e99cd2d144f8d_chalmers-case-study-hero.webp)](https://q-ctrl.com/case-study/chalmers-achieves-8x-faster-quantum-logic-using-boulder-opal)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0df/651ba784fa7b60ad8a9d3a23_opal-background.avif)

/* =========================================================
   GLOBAL STYLES
========================================================= */
body {
  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
  font-smooth: never;
}

p {
  white-space: unset;
  text-wrap: pretty;
}

.text-truncate {
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 3;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.w-embed:after, .w-embed:before { display: none !important; }

/* retain line height on Safari */
.button, .button-outline { font-variation-settings: "opsz" 16; }
.text-rich-text { font-variation-settings: "opsz" 18; }
.nav_link { font-variation-settings: "opsz" 16; }

.nav-link { 
  font-optical-sizing: none; 
  font-variation-settings: "opsz" 16; 
}

/* Safari Roboto Flex fix (Updated with new classes) */
.text-size-body,
.text-size-body-2,
.text-size-body-3,
.text-color-violet-700 {
  font-optical-sizing: none;
  font-variation-settings: 
    "opsz" 16,
    "wdth" 100,
    "GRAD" 0,
    "slnt" 0,
    "XTRA" 468,
    "XOPQ" 96,
    "YOPQ" 79,
    "YTLC" 514,
    "YTUC" 712,
    "YTAS" 750,
    "YTDE" -203,
    "YTFI" 738;
}

/* rich text margin fixes */
.w-richtext>:first-child { margin-top: 0; }
.w-richtext>:last-child,
.w-richtext ol li:last-child,
.w-richtext ul li:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }

/* pointer events helpers (FIX: add leading dot on clickable-off) */
.clickable-off { pointer-events: none; }
.clickable-on { pointer-events: auto; }

/* visually hidden */
.visually-hidden {
  position: absolute !important;
  clip: rect(1px, 1px, 1px, 1px);
  padding: 0 !important;
  border: 0 !important;
  height: 1px !important;
  width: 1px !important;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.div-square::after { content: ""; display: block; padding-bottom: 100%; }

main:focus-visible { outline: -webkit-focus-ring-color auto 0px; }

.container-medium, .container-small, .container-xsmall, .container-large {
  margin-right: auto !important;
  margin-left: auto !important;
}

.text-style-1line { white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.text-style-3lines { display: -webkit-box; overflow: hidden; -webkit-line-clamp: 3; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; }
.text-style-2lines { display: -webkit-box; overflow: hidden; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; }

.gap-column-huge { --column-gap: var(--size-huge, var(--gap-fallback)); }
.gap-column-xhuge { --column-gap: var(--size-xhuge, var(--gap-fallback)); }
.gap-column-xxhuge { --column-gap: var(--size-xxhuge, var(--gap-fallback)); }

.logo-table_row { background-color: transparent; }
.striped:nth-child(odd) { background-color: #F8F8FA; }
.striped:nth-child(even) { background-color: #FFFFFF; }

/* tables */
table {
  color: #35343C;
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  line-height: 1.5rem;
  text-align: left;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  width: 100%;
  margin-top: 3rem;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
}
table th { justify-content: space-between; color: #77767F; font-weight: 500; }
table th svg { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; color: currentcolor; background: currentcolor; }
table th, table td { padding: 0.75rem; border-bottom: 1px dotted #CCCBD1; }

.table-header-link { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-content: center; }

.table-compressed { font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.25rem; color: #55545D; }
.table-compressed th, .table-compressed td { padding: 0.625rem; }

.table-stripped tr:nth-child(odd) td:not(th) { background: #F8F8FA; }

.table-vertical-divider th:not(:last-child),
.table-vertical-divider td:not(:last-child) { border-right: 1px dotted #CCCBD1; }

.table-hover tr:hover th,
.table-hover tr:hover td,
.table-hover.table-stripped tr:hover th,
.table-hover.table-stripped tr:hover td {
  transition: 200ms ease;
  background: #F8F5FF;
}

.text-rich-text table th { color: var(--color-headline-4); vertical-align: top; }
.text-rich-text table td { color: var(--color-body-copy); }

.text-rich-text blockquote > em {
  display: block;
  position: relative;
  color: #77767F;
  font-size: 12px;
  margin-top: 8px;
}
.text-rich-text blockquote > em::before {
  display: inline-block;
  content: '—';
  margin-right: 4px;
}

/* opacity helpers */
[data-opacity="0"] { opacity: 0; }
[data-opacity="10"] { opacity: 0.1; }
[data-opacity="20"] { opacity: 0.2; }
[data-opacity="30"] { opacity: 0.3; }
[data-opacity="40"] { opacity: 0.4; }
[data-opacity="50"] { opacity: 0.5; }
[data-opacity="60"] { opacity: 0.6; }
[data-opacity="70"] { opacity: 0.7; }
[data-opacity="80"] { opacity: 0.8; }
[data-opacity="90"] { opacity: 0.9; }
[data-opacity="100"] { opacity: 1; }

[align-content="center"] .column { text-align: center; align-items: center; }
[align-content="left"] .column { text-align: left; align-items: flex-start; }
[align-content="right"] .column { text-align: right; align-items: flex-end; }

/* FIX: remove SCSS nesting; define :before separately */
.is-slot:empty {
  flex-grow: 1;
  min-height: 24px;
  height: 100%;
  background: url('https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/64fe49580f2049d94a40e0df/64fea636e214f2e762c1c369_placeholder.png') repeat top left;
  background-size: cover;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-accent);
  text-align: center;
  vertical-align: middle;
  border-radius: 0.25rem;
}
.is-slot:empty::before {
  content: 'Slot';
  display: inline;
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: var(--color-accent);
  text-shadow: -2px 0 var(--background-color-primary), 0 2px var(--background-color-primary), 2px 0 black, 0 -2px var(--background-color-primary);
}


/* =========================================================
   COLOR STYLES (data-bg-color)
========================================================= */
[data-bg-color="info-light"] { background-color: var(--color-blue-300); }
[data-bg-color="info"] { background-color: var(--color-blue-400); }
[data-bg-color="info-dark"] { background-color: var(--color-blue-500); }

[data-bg-color="success-light"] { background-color: var(--color-green-300); }
[data-bg-color="success"] { background-color: var(--color-green-400); }
[data-bg-color="success-dark"] { background-color: var(--color-green-500); }

[data-bg-color="warning-light"] { background-color: var(--color-yellow-300); }
[data-bg-color="warning"] { background-color: var(--color-yellow-400); }
[data-bg-color="warning-dark"] { background-color: var(--color-yellow-500); }

[data-bg-color="error-light"] { background-color: var(--color-red-300); }
[data-bg-color="error"] { background-color: var(--color-red-400); }
[data-bg-color="error-dark"] { background-color: var(--color-red-500); }


/* =========================================================
   SEMANTIC STYLES (themes)
========================================================= */

:root, [data-theme="dark"], .is-dark, .is-midnight {
  --color-bright: var(--color-white);
  --color-dim: var(--color-gray-500);
  --color-display-1: var(--color-white);
  --color-display-2: var(--color-display-1);
  --color-headline-1: var(--color-white);
  --color-headline-2: var(--color-headline-1);
  --color-headline-3: var(--color-headline-1);
  --color-headline-4: var(--color-gray-0);
  --color-headline-5: var(--color-headline-4);
  --color-headline-6: var(--color-gray-400);
  --color-body-copy: var(--color-gray-300);
  --color-blockquote: var(--color-white);
  --color-caption: var(--color-gray-400);
  --color-muted: var(--color-gray-500);
  --color-link-normal: var(--color-violet-400);
  --color-link-hover: var(--color-violet-500);
  --color-link-press: var(--color-violet-600);
  --color-accent: var(--color-violet-400);
  --color-breadcrumbs: var(--color-gray-0);
  --background-color-primary: var(--color-gray-900);
  --background-color-secondary: var(--color-violet-900);
  --background-color-tertiary: var(--color-gray-0);
  --gradient-color-start: rgb(108 108 108 / 25%);
  --gradient-color-end: rgb(108 108 108 / 0%);
  --gradient-fade-start: rgb(15 13 22 / 100%);
  --gradient-fade-end: rgb(15 13 22 / 0%);
  --border-color: var(--color-gray-600);
  --brand-color: var(--color-violet-400);
  --banner-wrapper-background: var(--color-gray-700);
  --font-weight-bold: 600;
  --font-weight-medium: 500;
  --font-weight-normal: 400;
  --font-weight-light: 350;

  /* Alert defaults (FIX: remove missing var() usage) */
  --alert-background-color: var(--color-gray-0);
  --alert-color: var(--color-gray-600);
  --alert-border-color: var(--color-gray-300);
  --alert-icon-color: var(--color-gray-400);
  --alert-icon-border-color: var(--color-gray-100);
}

[data-theme="secondary"], .is-secondary, .is-twilight {
  --color-bright: var(--color-white);
  --color-dim: var(--color-gray-500);
  --color-display-1: var(--color-white);
  --color-display-2: var(--color-display-1);
  --color-headline-1: var(--color-white);
  --color-headline-2: var(--color-headline-1);
  --color-headline-3: var(--color-headline-1);
  --color-headline-4: var(--color-gray-0);
  --color-headline-5: var(--color-headline-4);
  --color-headline-6: var(--color-gray-500);
  --color-body-copy: var(--color-gray-300);
  --color-blockquote: var(--color-violet-0);
  --color-caption: var(--color-gray-400);
  --color-muted: var(--color-gray-500);
  --color-breadcrumbs: var(--color-violet-0);
  --background-color-primary: var(--color-violet-900);
  --background-color-secondary: var(--color-gray-900);
  --background-color-tertiary: var(--color-gray-0);
  --gradient-fade-start: rgb(30 0 51 / 100%);
  --gradient-fade-end: rgb(30 0 51 / 0%);
  --border-color: var(--color-violet-700);
  --banner-wrapper-background: var(--color-gray-700);
}

[data-theme="light"], .is-light, .is-daylight {
  --color-bright: var(--color-gray-900);
  --color-dim: var(--color-gray-500);
  --color-display-1: var(--color-gray-900);
  --color-display-2: var(--color-display-1);
  --color-headline-1: var(--color-gray-900);
  --color-headline-2: var(--color-violet-900);
  --color-headline-3: var(--color-headline-2);
  --color-headline-4: var(--color-headline-2);
  --color-headline-5: var(--color-headline-2);
  --color-headline-6: var(--color-gray-400);
  --color-body-copy: var(--color-gray-700);
  --color-blockquote: var(--color-gray-900);
  --color-caption: var(--color-gray-400);
  --color-muted: var(--color-gray-500);
  --color-link-normal: var(--color-violet-500);
  --color-link-hover: var(--color-violet-400);
  --color-link-press: var(--color-violet-600);
  --color-accent: var(--color-violet-500);
  --background-color-primary: var(--color-gray-0);
  --gradient-fade-start: rgb(248 248 250 / 100%);
  --gradient-fade-end: rgb(248 248 250 / 0%);
  --border-color: var(--color-gray-300);
  --brand-color: var(--color-violet-500);
  --banner-wrapper-background: var(--color-gray-100);
  --color-breadcrumbs: var(--color-gray-400);
  --font-weight-bold: 525;
  --font-weight-medium: 475;
  --font-weight-normal: 400;
  --font-weight-light: 325;
}

::selection {
  background: var(--color-accent);
  /* NOTE: you had --color-heading-1, but variables are --color-headline-1 */
  color: var(--color-headline-1);
}

body {
  background-color: var(--background-color-primary);
  color: var(--color-body-copy);
  transition: background-color 350ms ease-in-out;
}

.display-1:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-display-1); font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); }
.display-2:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-display-2); font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); }

h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, p { margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 1em; }

h1, .headline-1:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-headline-1); font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); }
h2, .headline-2:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-headline-2); font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); }
h3, .headline-3:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-headline-3); font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); }
h4, .headline-4:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-headline-4); font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); }
h5, .headline-5:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-headline-5); font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); }
h6, .headline-6:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-headline-6); font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); }

p, .body-copy:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-body-copy); }

.caption:not([class*="text-color-"]),
.caption-title:not([class*="text-color-"]),
.text-size-caption:not([class*="text-color-"]),
.text-size-caption-title:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-caption); }

blockquote, .blockquote:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-blockquote); border-color: var(--color-accent); }

code { padding: 0 8px; margin: 0 !important; width: 100%; border-radius: 4px; }
code, .code { -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale; }

li::marker { color: var(--color-accent); }
ol > li::marker { font-size: .875em; vertical-align: baseline; }

.text-style-muted:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-muted); }

a, .text-style-link { color: var(--color-link-normal); font-weight: var(--font-weight-medium); text-decoration: inherit; }
a:hover, .text-style-link:hover { color: var(--color-link-hover); }

/* FIX: :press is not a real CSS pseudo-class. Use :active. */
a:active, .text-style-link:active { color: var(--color-link-press); }

/* FIX: invalid selector "a * >" */
a * { color: inherit; text-decoration: inherit; font-size: inherit; }

.text-color-accent:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--color-accent); }
.text-color-brand:not([class*="text-color-"]) { color: var(--brand-color); }

b, strong, .text-weight-bold { font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); }
.text-weight-medium { font-weight: var(--font-weight-medium); }
.text-weight-normal { font-weight: var(--font-weight-normal); }
.text-weight-light { font-weight: var(--font-weight-light); }

.background-color-primary { background-color: var(--background-color-primary); }
.background-color-secondary { background-color: var(--background-color-secondary); }
.background-color-tertiary { background-color: var(--background-color-tertiary); }

.background-color-gradient {
  background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--gradient-color-start), var(--gradient-color-end));
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}

.gradient-fade {
  background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gradient-fade-start), var(--gradient-fade-end));
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}

.gradient-fade-down {
  background-image: linear-gradient(0deg, var(--gradient-fade-start), var(--gradient-fade-end));
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}

.banner-wrapper-background { background-color: var(--banner-wrapper-background); }

hr, .divider_component, .border-color-primary, .fs-styleguide_color-sample { border-color: var(--border-color); }

.fs-styleguide_brand { color: var(--brand-color); border-color: var(--border-color); }

@media screen and (max-width: 991px) { body.no-scroll { overflow: hidden; } }

section[data-theme="dark"] .is-invertible { filter: brightness(0) invert(1); }
section[data-theme="light"] .is-invertible { filter: invert(1); }


/* =========================================================
   COMPONENT STYLES
========================================================= */
[data-padding-top='false'] .section-padding { padding-top: 0; }
[data-centered='true'] { align-items: center; text-align: center; }

[data-background-position='center'] { object-position: center center; }
[data-background-position='tr'] { object-position: top right; }
[data-background-position='br'] { object-position: bottom right; }
[data-background-position='bl'] { object-position: bottom left; }
[data-background-position='tl'] { object-position: top left; }

@media screen and (min-width: 992px) { .nav_component_menu { transform: none !important; } }
@media screen and (max-width: 991px) {
  .w-nav-menu { overflow: auto; max-height: calc(100svh - 64px); }
}

.nav_alert-truncate {
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 1;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

.component_breadcrumbs { color: var(--color-breadcrumbs); }

/* Alert */
.alert {
  background-color: var(--alert-background-color, var(--color-gray-0));
  color: var(--alert-color, var(--color-gray-600));
  border-color: var(--alert-border-color, var(--color-gray-300));
}
.alert-icon {
  color: var(--alert-icon-color, var(--color-gray-400));
  border-color: var(--alert-icon-border-color, var(--color-gray-100));
}
.alert-info {
  --alert-background-color: var(--color-blue-0);
  --alert-color: var(--color-blue-500);
  --alert-border-color: var(--color-blue-300);
  --alert-icon-color: var(--color-blue-300);
  --alert-icon-border-color: var(--color-blue-100);
}
.alert-success {
  --alert-background-color: var(--color-green-0);
  --alert-color: var(--color-green-500);
  --alert-border-color: var(--color-green-300);
  --alert-icon-color: var(--color-green-300);
  --alert-icon-border-color: var(--color-green-100);
}
.alert-warning {
  --alert-background-color: var(--color-yellow-0);
  --alert-color: var(--color-yellow-500);
  --alert-border-color: var(--color-yellow-300);
  --alert-icon-color: var(--color-yellow-300);
  --alert-icon-border-color: var(--color-yellow-100);
}
.alert-error {
  --alert-background-color: var(--color-red-0);
  --alert-color: var(--color-red-500);
  --alert-border-color: var(--color-red-300);
  --alert-icon-color: var(--color-red-300);
  --alert-icon-border-color: var(--color-red-100);
}

/* Button */
:root {
  --button-border-color: var(--color-violet-500);
  --button-background-color: var(--button-border-color);
  --button-text-color: var(--color-gray-100);
}

.button, .button-square {
  background-color: var(--button-background-color);
  border-color: var(--button-border-color);
  color: var(--button-text-color);
  box-shadow: 0px 0px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04), 0px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32);
  cursor: pointer;
}
.button:hover, .button-square:hover { --button-border-color: var(--color-white); }

/* FIX: :press -> :active */
.button:active, .button-square:active { --button-border-color: var(--color-white); }

.button-square { border-radius: 999px; }

.button-outline {
  --button-background-color: transparent;
  --button-text-color: var(--button-border-color);
  box-shadow: none;
}
.button-outline:hover,
.button-outline:active {
  --button-background-color: var(--button-border-color);
  --button-text-color: var(--color-gray-100);
  box-shadow: 0px 0px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04), 0px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32);
}

.button-secondary {
  --button-border-color: var(--color-gray-100);
  --button-background-color: var(--button-border-color);
  --button-text-color: var(--color-gray-900);
}
.button-secondary:hover { --button-border-color: var(--color-white); --button-background-color: var(--button-border-color); }
.button-secondary:active { --button-border-color: var(--color-gray-200); --button-background-color: var(--button-border-color); }
.button-secondary.button-outline:hover,
.button-secondary.button-outline:active { --button-text-color: var(--color-gray-900); }

.button-error { --button-border-color: var(--color-red-400); --button-background-color: var(--button-border-color); }
.button-error:hover { --button-border-color: var(--color-red-300); --button-background-color: var(--button-border-color); }
.button-error:active { --button-border-color: var(--color-red-500); --button-background-color: var(--button-border-color); }

/* Theme Toggle */
.theme-toggle .checkbox { opacity: 0; position: absolute; margin-bottom: 0; }

.theme-toggle .checkbox-label {
  background-color: var(--background-color-primary);
  width: 58px;
  height: 30px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
  border-radius: 50px;
  position: relative;
  padding: 5px;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.icon-moon { color: var(--color-violet-400); }
.icon-sun { color: var(--color-orange-400); }

.theme-toggle .checkbox-label .ball {
  background-color: var(--border-color);
  width: 24px;
  height: 24px;
  position: absolute;
  left: 2px;
  top: 2px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  transition: transform 0.2s linear;
}

.theme-toggle .checkbox:checked + .checkbox-label .ball { transform: translateX(28px); }

/* Card */
.card-image-wrapper { transition: opacity 300ms ease; }
.card_blog-post .card-image-wrapper { opacity: 1; }
.card_blog-post:hover .card-image-wrapper { opacity: .5; }


/* =========================================================
   TEXT + IMAGE STYLES (FIX: remove SCSS nesting)
========================================================= */
@media screen and (min-width: 992px) {
  .grid_text-image {
    --section--text-image-small: 1fr;
    --section--text-image-large: 1.25fr;
    --section-text-image-col-1: var(--section--text-image-small);
    --section-text-image-col-2: var(--section--text-image-large);

    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: var(--section-text-image-col-1) var(--section-text-image-col-2);
    gap: 6rem;
  }

  /* odd containers swap columns */
  .container_text-image:nth-child(odd) .grid_text-image {
    --section-text-image-col-1: var(--section--text-image-large);
    --section-text-image-col-2: var(--section--text-image-small);
  }
  .container_text-image:nth-child(odd) .grid_text-image .grid_column:first-of-type {
    order: 1;
  }

  /* Reverse order */
  [data-reversed="true"] .grid_text-image {
    --section-text-image-col-1: var(--section--text-image-large);
    --section-text-image-col-2: var(--section--text-image-small);
  }
  [data-reversed="true"] .grid_text-image .grid_column:first-of-type { order: 1; }
  [data-reversed="true"] .container_text-image:nth-child(odd) .grid_text-image {
    --section-text-image-col-1: var(--section--text-image-small);
    --section-text-image-col-2: var(--section--text-image-large);
  }
  [data-reversed="true"] .container_text-image:nth-child(odd) .grid_text-image .grid_column:first-of-type {
    order: 0;
  }

  /* Align content */
  [data-align-content="true"] .grid_text-image,
  [data-align-content="true"] .container_text-image:nth-child(odd) .grid_text-image {
    --section-text-image-col-1: var(--section--text-image-small);
    --section-text-image-col-2: var(--section--text-image-large);
  }
  [data-align-content="true"] .grid_text-image .grid_column:first-of-type,
  [data-align-content="true"] .container_text-image:nth-child(odd) .grid_text-image .grid_column:first-of-type {
    order: 0;
  }

  /* Align + Reverse */
  [data-align-content="true"][data-reversed="true"] .grid_text-image,
  [data-align-content="true"][data-reversed="true"] .container_text-image:nth-child(odd) .grid_text-image {
    --section-text-image-col-1: var(--section--text-image-large);
    --section-text-image-col-2: var(--section--text-image-small);
  }
  [data-align-content="true"][data-reversed="true"] .grid_text-image .grid_column:first-of-type,
  [data-align-content="true"][data-reversed="true"] .container_text-image:nth-child(odd) .grid_text-image .grid_column:first-of-type {
    order: 1;

  .nav_dropdown-list {
    background-color: transparent !important;
    background: transparent !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    border: none !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
    min-width: 0 !important;
  }

  .nav_dropdown-list.is-open {
    overflow: visible !important;
    background-color: transparent !important;
  }

  .nav-container {
    transform: none !important;
  }

  .platform_card:hover .icon {
    border-color: #73739c;
  }

  .nav_link-card:hover .text-size-body-2.text-weight-bold.text-color-white {
    text-decoration: underline !important;
    text-underline-offset: 2px;
  }

  .nav-overlay {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: 999;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
    backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
    opacity: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
  }

  .nav-overlay.is-visible {
    display: block;
    opacity: 1;
    pointer-events: auto;
  }

  .nav_bar {
    z-index: 1001 !important;
  }

  .nav-secondary {
    z-index: 1000 !important;
  }

  .nav-secondary .nav_menu-button {
    display: none !important;
  }

  .nav_component-wrapper.mobile-menu-open {
    border-bottom-left-radius: 0 !important;
    border-bottom-right-radius: 0 !important;
  }

  @media screen and (max-width: 991px) {
    .nav_component-wrapper.mobile-menu-open {
      padding-left: 0 !important;
      padding-right: 0 !important;
    }

    .nav_component-wrapper.mobile-menu-open .container-large-nav_container {
      padding-left: 0.75rem;
      padding-right: 0.75rem;
    }

    .nav_dropdown-list:not(.w--open) {
      pointer-events: none !important;
    }

    .nav_menu.w-nav-menu {
      height: auto !important;
      max-height: 80vh !important;
      max-height: 89dvh !important;
      overflow-y: auto !important;
    }

    .nav_component-wrapper .w-nav-overlay {
      left: -1px !important;
      right: -1px !important;
      width: calc(100% + 2px) !important;
    }
  }

  .nav_container-secondary.tray-open {
    border-bottom-left-radius: 0 !important;
    border-bottom-right-radius: 0 !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(248, 248, 250, 0.15) !important;
    border-bottom: none !important;
  }

  #nav-secondary-tray {
    /* 1. Matches your global Webflow border radius */
    border-bottom-left-radius: var(--_size-primitives---border-radius--1) !important;
    border-bottom-right-radius: var(--_size-primitives---border-radius--1) !important;
    
    /* 2. Explicitly declare all three borders to guarantee they render */
    border-left: 1px solid transparent !important;
    border-right: 1px solid transparent !important;
    border-bottom: 1px solid transparent !important;
    border-top: none !important;
    transition: border-color 0.3s ease;

    /* 3. STOPS THE PAGE PUSH */
    position: absolute !important;
    top: 100% !important; 
    
    /* 4. FIX: Pulls the tray out 1px on the sides to connect seamlessly with the parent's outer border */
    left: -1px !important; 
    width: calc(100% + 2px) !important;
    
    box-sizing: border-box !important;
  }

  /* Forces the border color and solid background to show up when open */
  .nav_container-secondary.tray-open ~ #nav-secondary-tray,
  .nav_container-secondary.tray-open #nav-secondary-tray {
    border-left-color: rgba(248, 248, 250, 0.15) !important;
    border-right-color: rgba(248, 248, 250, 0.15) !important;
    border-bottom-color: rgba(248, 248, 250, 0.15) !important;
    background-color: rgb(13, 13, 23) !important;
  }
</style>

<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    // ─── Shared elements ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    const overlay = document.createElement('div');
    overlay.classList.add('nav-overlay');
    document.body.appendChild(overlay);

    const navBar = document.querySelector('.nav_bar');
    const navWrapper = document.querySelector('.nav_component-wrapper');
    const secondaryNav = document.querySelector('.nav-secondary');
    const hamburger = navBar ? navBar.querySelector('.nav_menu-button') : null;

    // ─── Overlay helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    function showOverlay() {
      overlay.style.display = 'block';
      requestAnimationFrame(() => overlay.classList.add('is-visible'));
    }

    function hideOverlay() {
      overlay.classList.remove('is-visible');
      setTimeout(() => {
        overlay.style.display = 'none';
      }, 300);
    }

    // ─── Disable Webflow hover on all breakpoints ──────────────────────────────

    document.querySelectorAll('.nav_dropdown').forEach((dd) => {
      dd.setAttribute('data-hover', 'false');
      dd.setAttribute('data-delay', '0');
    });

    // ─── Mobile menu border radius + overlay width/height fix ─────────────────

    if (hamburger && navWrapper) {
      new MutationObserver(function () {
        const isOpen = hamburger.classList.contains('w--open');
        navWrapper.classList.toggle('mobile-menu-open', isOpen);

        if (isOpen) {
          requestAnimationFrame(() => {
            const wNavOverlay = navWrapper.querySelector('.w-nav-overlay');
            if (wNavOverlay) {
              wNavOverlay.style.setProperty('left', '-1px', 'important');
              wNavOverlay.style.setProperty('right', '-1px', 'important');
              wNavOverlay.style.setProperty('width', 'calc(100% + 2px)', 'important');
            }

            const menu = navWrapper.querySelector('.w-nav-menu');
            if (menu) {
              menu.style.setProperty('width', 'calc(100% + 2px)', 'important');
              menu.style.setProperty('max-height', '89dvh', 'important');
            }
          });
        }
      }).observe(hamburger, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['class'] });
    }

    // ─── Icon helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    const ICON_OPEN = 'translate3d(0px,0px,0px) scale3d(1,1,1) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(0deg) rotateZ(180deg) skew(0deg,0deg)';
    const ICON_CLOSED = 'translate3d(0px,0px,0px) scale3d(1,1,1) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(0deg) rotateZ(0deg) skew(0deg,0deg)';

    function setIconOpen(dd) {
      const icon = dd.querySelector('.nav_dropdown-icon');
      if (icon) icon.style.transform = ICON_OPEN;
    }

    function setIconClosed(dd) {
      const icon = dd.querySelector('.nav_dropdown-icon');
      if (icon) icon.style.transform = ICON_CLOSED;
    }

    // ─── Desktop dropdown ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    if (window.innerWidth >= 992) {
      const dropdowns = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.nav_dropdown'));
      const nav = document.querySelector('.nav_menu');
      let activeIndex = null;
      let closeTimer = null;
      let overflowTimers = {};

      dropdowns.forEach((dd) => {
        const toggle = dd.querySelector('.nav_button-toggle');
        if (toggle)
          toggle.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            e.stopPropagation();
          });
      });

      function getAnimTarget(list) {
        return list.querySelector('.grid_12-column') || list.querySelector('.nav-container');
      }

      function measureHeight(list) {
        const prev = [list.style.height, list.style.overflow];
        list.style.height = 'auto';
        list.style.overflow = 'hidden';
        const container = list.querySelector('.nav-container');
        const h = container ? container.offsetHeight + 16 : 0;
        [list.style.height, list.style.overflow] = prev;
        return h;
      }

      function openPanel(index) {
        const fromIndex = activeIndex;
        const isSwitching = fromIndex !== null && fromIndex !== index;
        const direction = fromIndex !== null && fromIndex < index ? 1 : -1;
        const list = dropdowns[index].querySelector('.nav_dropdown-list');
        const animTarget = getAnimTarget(list);

        clearTimeout(closeTimer);
        clearTimeout(overflowTimers[index]);

        showOverlay();

        if (secondaryNav) secondaryNav.style.setProperty('opacity', '0', 'important');

        dropdowns[index].classList.add('w--open');
        dropdowns[index].querySelector('.nav_button-toggle').classList.add('w--open');
        setIconOpen(dropdowns[index]);

        if (isSwitching) {
          const oldList = dropdowns[fromIndex].querySelector('.nav_dropdown-list');
          const oldTarget = getAnimTarget(oldList);
          const currentHeight = oldList.getBoundingClientRect().height;

          clearTimeout(overflowTimers[fromIndex]);

          dropdowns[fromIndex].classList.remove('w--open');
          dropdowns[fromIndex].querySelector('.nav_button-toggle').classList.remove('w--open');
          setIconClosed(dropdowns[fromIndex]);

          if (oldTarget) {
            oldTarget.style.transition = 'none';
            oldTarget.style.opacity = '0';
          }

          oldList.classList.remove('is-open');
          oldList.style.cssText += 'overflow:hidden;transition:none;height:0px;';
          list.style.cssText += `overflow:hidden;transition:none;height:${currentHeight}px;`;
        }

        animTarget.style.transition = 'none';
        animTarget.style.transform = `translateX(${direction * 40}px)`;
        animTarget.style.opacity = '0';

        const targetHeight = measureHeight(list);

        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
          list.style.overflow = 'hidden';
          list.style.transition = 'height 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)';
          list.style.height = targetHeight + 'px';

          overflowTimers[index] = setTimeout(() => {
            if (activeIndex === index) {
              list.style.overflow = 'visible';
              list.classList.add('is-open');
            }
          }, 310);

          requestAnimationFrame(() => {
            animTarget.style.transition = 'transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.25s ease';
            animTarget.style.transform = 'translateX(0px)';
            animTarget.style.opacity = '1';
          });
        });

        activeIndex = index;
      }

      function closeAll() {
        dropdowns.forEach((dd, i) => {
          const list = dd.querySelector('.nav_dropdown-list');
          const animTarget = getAnimTarget(list);

          clearTimeout(overflowTimers[i]);

          list.classList.remove('is-open');
          list.style.overflow = 'hidden';
          list.style.transition = 'height 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)';
          list.style.height = '0px';

          dd.classList.remove('w--open');
          dd.querySelector('.nav_button-toggle').classList.remove('w--open');
          setIconClosed(dd);

          if (animTarget) {
            animTarget.style.transition = 'opacity 0.15s ease';
            animTarget.style.opacity = '0';
          }
        });

        hideOverlay();

        if (secondaryNav) secondaryNav.style.removeProperty('opacity');

        activeIndex = null;
      }

      function isMovingTowardList(e) {
        if (activeIndex === null) return false;
        const rect = dropdowns[activeIndex].querySelector('.nav_dropdown-list').getBoundingClientRect();
        return e.clientY >= rect.top - 20 && e.clientX >= rect.left && e.clientX <= rect.right;
      }

      overlay.addEventListener('click', closeAll);

      dropdowns.forEach((dd, i) => {
        const list = dd.querySelector('.nav_dropdown-list');
        const animTarget = getAnimTarget(list);
        const navContainer = list.querySelector('.nav-container');
        const icon = dd.querySelector('.nav_dropdown-icon');

        list.style.height = '0px';
        list.style.overflow = 'hidden';
        list.style.display = 'block';

        if (navContainer) navContainer.style.marginTop = '8px';
        if (animTarget) animTarget.style.opacity = '0';
        if (icon) icon.style.transition = 'transform 0.3s ease';

        dd.querySelector('.nav_button-toggle').addEventListener('mouseenter', () => openPanel(i));
        dd.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => clearTimeout(closeTimer));

        dd.addEventListener('mouseleave', (e) => {
          if (isMovingTowardList(e)) return;
          if (!e.relatedTarget || !dd.contains(e.relatedTarget)) closeTimer = setTimeout(closeAll, 150);
        });

        list.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => clearTimeout(closeTimer));
        list.addEventListener('mouseleave', (e) => {
          if (!e.relatedTarget || (!list.contains(e.relatedTarget) && !nav.contains(e.relatedTarget))) closeTimer = setTimeout(closeAll, 150);
        });
      });

      if (nav) {
        nav.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => clearTimeout(closeTimer));
        nav.addEventListener('mouseleave', (e) => {
          if (isMovingTowardList(e)) return;
          if (!e.relatedTarget || !nav.contains(e.relatedTarget)) closeTimer = setTimeout(closeAll, 150);
        });
      }
    }

    // ─── Mobile overlay ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    if (window.innerWidth < 992) {
      let overlaySource = null; // 'hamburger' | 'dropdown'

      if (hamburger) {
        new MutationObserver(function () {
          if (hamburger.classList.contains('w--open')) {
            overlaySource = 'hamburger';
            showOverlay();
          } else if (overlaySource === 'hamburger') {
            overlaySource = null;
            hideOverlay();
          }
        }).observe(hamburger, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['class'] });
      }

      document.querySelectorAll('.nav_dropdown').forEach((dd) => {
        const toggle = dd.querySelector('.nav_button-toggle');
        if (!toggle) return;

        new MutationObserver(function () {
          if (overlaySource === 'hamburger') return;

          const anyOpen = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.nav_button-toggle'))
            .some((t) => t.classList.contains('w--open'));

          if (anyOpen) {
            overlaySource = 'dropdown';
            showOverlay();
          } else {
            overlaySource = null;
            hideOverlay();
          }
        }).observe(toggle, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['class'] });
      });

      overlay.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
        e.stopPropagation();

        if (overlaySource === 'hamburger' && hamburger) {
          hamburger.click();
        } else {
          document.querySelectorAll('.nav_button-toggle.w--open').forEach((t) => t.click());
        }

        overlaySource = null;
        hideOverlay();
      });
    }

// ─── Secondary nav ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    const primaryNav = navBar;

    // 1. Target both headers so the mobile tray builds properly
    const hero = document.querySelector('.section_header, .section_product-hero');

    if (!secondaryNav || !hero) return;

    const navItems = secondaryNav.querySelector('.nav-secondary-items');
    const navLogo = secondaryNav.querySelector('.nav-secondary-logo');
    const container = secondaryNav.querySelector('.nav_container-secondary');

    const mobileToggle = document.createElement('button');
    mobileToggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
    mobileToggle.setAttribute('aria-controls', 'nav-secondary-tray');
    mobileToggle.style.cssText = 'display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;width:100%;background:none;border:none;padding:0;cursor:pointer;height:44px;flex-shrink:0;';

    const logoClone = navLogo.cloneNode(true);
    logoClone.removeAttribute('style');

    const chevron = document.createElement('span');
    chevron.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0;transition:transform 0.3s ease;';
    chevron.innerHTML = '<svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M19.5 8.25L12 15.75L4.5 8.25" stroke="#F8F8FA" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>';

    mobileToggle.appendChild(logoClone);
    mobileToggle.appendChild(chevron);

    const tray = document.createElement('div');
    tray.id = 'nav-secondary-tray';
    tray.style.cssText = 'display:none;overflow:hidden;max-height:0;width:100%;background-color:#0d0d17d1;-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(26px);backdrop-filter:blur(26px);box-sizing:border-box;padding:0 .65rem;';

    const trayInner = document.createElement('div');
    trayInner.style.cssText = 'display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;padding:0 0 0.75rem 0;';

    const links = navItems.querySelectorAll('a');

    links.forEach(function (link, index) {
      const trayLink = link.cloneNode(true);
      const isLast = index === links.length - 1;
      trayLink.style.cssText = 'padding:0.75rem;color:var(--color-gray-0);font-size:0.9375rem;text-decoration:none;display:block;width:100%;text-align:left;box-sizing:border-box;' + (isLast ? '' : 'border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);');

      if (trayLink.getAttribute('href').startsWith('#')) trayLink.addEventListener('click', closeTray);

      trayInner.appendChild(trayLink);
    });

    tray.appendChild(trayInner);

    container.appendChild(mobileToggle);
    container.appendChild(tray); // FIX: Appended to container so the absolute width perfectly aligns

    overlay.addEventListener('click', function () {
      if (isOpen) closeTray();
    });

    let isOpen = false;

    function openTray() {
      isOpen = true;
      tray.style.maxHeight = trayInner.scrollHeight + 'px';
      chevron.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)';
      mobileToggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
      container.classList.add('tray-open');
      showOverlay();
    }

    function closeTray() {
      isOpen = false;
      tray.style.maxHeight = '0';
      chevron.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)';
      mobileToggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
      container.classList.remove('tray-open');
      hideOverlay();
    }

    mobileToggle.addEventListener('click', () => (isOpen ? closeTray() : openTray()));

    function applyLayout() {
      if (window.innerWidth <= 767) {
        mobileToggle.style.display = 'flex';
        navLogo.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important');
        navItems.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important');
        secondaryNav.style.setProperty('height', 'auto', 'important');
        secondaryNav.style.setProperty('min-height', 'unset', 'important');
        secondaryNav.style.setProperty('display', 'flex', 'important');
        secondaryNav.style.setProperty('flex-direction', 'column', 'important');
        secondaryNav.style.setProperty('align-items', 'stretch', 'important');
        container.style.setProperty('max-width', '100%', 'important');
        container.style.setProperty('padding-top', '0', 'important');
        container.style.setProperty('padding-bottom', '0', 'important');
        tray.style.display = 'block';
      } else {
        mobileToggle.style.display = 'none';
        navLogo.style.removeProperty('display');
        navItems.style.removeProperty('display');
        closeTray();
        tray.style.display = 'none';
        secondaryNav.style.setProperty('height', '45px', 'important');
        secondaryNav.style.setProperty('min-height', '45px', 'important');
        secondaryNav.style.removeProperty('flex-direction');
        secondaryNav.style.removeProperty('align-items');
        container.style.removeProperty('max-width');
        container.style.removeProperty('padding-top');
        container.style.removeProperty('padding-bottom');
      }
    }

    applyLayout();
    window.addEventListener('resize', applyLayout);

    // 2. Keep your 4px spacer and exact top calculations so spacing doesn't break
    const spacer = document.createElement('div');
    spacer.style.cssText = 'height:4px;width:100%;pointer-events:none;';
    secondaryNav.parentNode.insertBefore(spacer, secondaryNav);

    function updateSecondaryTop() {
      const navHeight = primaryNav ? primaryNav.offsetHeight : 0;
      const navStickyTop = primaryNav ? (parseInt(getComputedStyle(primaryNav).top) || 0) : 0;
      secondaryNav.style.setProperty('top', navStickyTop + navHeight + 4 + 'px', 'important');
    }

    updateSecondaryTop();
    window.addEventListener('resize', updateSecondaryTop);

    // 3. Keep it sticky, but REMOVE the observer/opacity logic so Script 2 can control it!
    secondaryNav.style.setProperty('position', 'sticky', 'important');
    
    secondaryNav.style.marginTop = '0px';

  });
</script></div></nav><main class="main-wrapper"><section id="top" class="hero_section"><div class="hero_background"><div class="hero_background-gradient"></div><div class="w-embed"><style>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const tracks = document.querySelectorAll('[carousel-content]');
  if (!tracks.length) return;

  // Clone logos
  tracks.forEach(track => {
    const originals = Array.from(track.children);
    originals.forEach(el => {
      const clone = el.cloneNode(true);
      clone.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
      track.appendChild(clone);
    });
  });

  // Keep track of the initial window width
  let windowWidth = window.innerWidth;
  let resizeTimer;

  // Restart animation ONLY if the window width changes
  window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
    // Check if the current width is different from the stored width
    if (window.innerWidth !== windowWidth) {
      windowWidth = window.innerWidth; // Update the stored width
      
      clearTimeout(resizeTimer);
      resizeTimer = setTimeout(() => {
        tracks.forEach(track => {
          track.style.animation = 'none';
          track.offsetHeight; // force reflow
          track.style.animation = '';
        });
      }, 150);
    }
  });
});
</script></div><div class="ticker-horizontal_fade-left"></div><div class="ticker-horizontal_fade-right"></div><div carousel-content="true" class="ticker-horizontal_content"><img /* 1. Sibling & Hover Dimming Logic (Targets the accordion wrapper) */
.has-active .user-type_accordion:not(.is-active-accordion) {
  opacity: 0.15;
}

.has-hover .user-type_accordion:not(.is-hovered-accordion) {
  opacity: 0.18;
}

/* 2. Wrapper & Trigger styling */
.user-type_accordion {
  transition: opacity 0.4s ease;
  will-change: opacity;
}

.user-type_item {
  cursor: pointer;
}

/* 3. Panel expansion using the SIBLING selector (+) */
.user-type_products {
  display: grid; 
  grid-template-rows: 0fr !important;
  padding-top: 0 !important;
  padding-bottom: 0 !important;
  transition: grid-template-rows 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), padding 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) !important;
}

.user-type_item.is-active + .user-type_products {
  grid-template-rows: 1fr !important;
  padding-top: 2rem !important; 
  padding-bottom: 4rem !important;
}

.user-type_products > div {
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* 4. Context animations */
.user-type_content {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(12px);
  transition: opacity 0.45s ease 0.08s, transform 0.55s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) 0.08s;
}

.user-type_item.is-active + .user-type_products .user-type_content {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
}

/* 5. Product card styling & staggered animations */
.component_card-product {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(8px);
  transition: opacity 0.4s ease, transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), border-color 0.25s ease, background 0.25s ease;
}

.component_card-product:nth-child(1) { transition-delay: 0.07s; }
.component_card-product:nth-child(2) { transition-delay: 0.13s; }
.component_card-product:nth-child(3) { transition-delay: 0.19s; }
.component_card-product:nth-child(4) { transition-delay: 0.25s; }

.user-type_item.is-active + .user-type_products .component_card-product {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
}

/* Base state of the icon */
.row_industries-icon {
  width: 34px;
  height: 34px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  transform-origin: center center;
  transition: transform 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
  will-change: transform;
}

/* Rotated state when the row is open */
.user-type_item.is-active .row_industries-icon {
  transform: rotate(135deg); 
}
</style>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  // Select all the accordion component wrappers
  const accordions = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.user-type_accordion'));
  if (!accordions.length) return;
  
  // Automatically find whatever Webflow container holds these accordions
  const list = accordions[0].parentElement; 
  let activeAccordion = null;

  function openRow(accordion) {
    if (activeAccordion && activeAccordion !== accordion) closeRow(activeAccordion);
    
    // Add active classes to both the wrapper and the trigger
    accordion.classList.add('is-active-accordion');
    accordion.querySelector('.user-type_item').classList.add('is-active');
    
    if(list) list.classList.add('has-active');
    activeAccordion = accordion;
  }

  function closeRow(accordion) {
    accordion.classList.remove('is-active-accordion');
    accordion.querySelector('.user-type_item').classList.remove('is-active');
    
    if (activeAccordion === accordion) {
      activeAccordion = null;
      if(list) list.classList.remove('has-active');
    }
  }

  accordions.forEach((accordion) => {
    // The trigger area inside each accordion component
    const trigger = accordion.querySelector('.user-type_item');
    if (!trigger) return;

    trigger.addEventListener('click', () => {
      accordion.classList.contains('is-active-accordion') ? closeRow(accordion) : openRow(accordion);
    });

    trigger.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
      if (!accordion.classList.contains('is-active-accordion')) {
        if(list) list.classList.add('has-hover');
        accordion.classList.add('is-hovered-accordion');
      }
    });

    trigger.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      accordion.classList.remove('is-hovered-accordion');
      if(list) list.classList.remove('has-hover');
    });
  });
});
</script></div></section><div data-padding-top="true" data-theme="dark" class="section_divider background-color-primary"><div class="section-padding section_divider"><div class="flex-col"><div class="container-large"><div class="divider_component"></div></div></div></div></div><section class="section_case-studies"><div class="section-padding"><div class="flex-col gap-4xl"><div class="w-layout-blockcontainer container-large w-container"><div class="eyebrow"><h6 class="headline-6">Case studies</h6></div><div class="grid_12-column"><div id="w-node-_96580a92-7fcf-68dd-246a-7632a23f15bd-a23f15b5" class="column align-left"><h2 class="headline-1">Real-world use cases</h2></div><div id="w-node-_96580a92-7fcf-68dd-246a-7632a23f15c0-a23f15b5" class="slider_arrow-container"><div class="slider-prev swiper-button-disabled" tabindex="-1" role="button" aria-label="Previous slide" aria-controls="swiper-wrapper-9f95a75ed131de4c" aria-disabled="true"><div class="icon-1x1-xlarge w-embed"><svg width="26" height="26" viewBox="0 0 26 26" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/swiper@11/swiper-bundle.min.js" defer=""></script>

<script>
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
    const carousels = document.querySelectorAll('.section_case-studies');

    carousels.forEach((carousel) => {
      const swiperElement = carousel.querySelector('.swiper');
      const nextButton = carousel.querySelector('.slider-next');
      const prevButton = carousel.querySelector('.slider-prev');

      if (swiperElement) {
        new Swiper(swiperElement, {
          slidesPerView: 'auto', 
          spaceBetween: 24, // THIS IS WHAT CREATES YOUR GAP
          slidesOffsetBefore: 0, 
          
          observer: true,
          observeParents: true,
          resizeObserver: true,
          
          grabCursor: true, 
          keyboard: {
            enabled: true,
            onlyInViewport: true,
          },
          a11y: {
            slideRole: "listitem"
          },
          
          navigation: {
            nextEl: nextButton,
            prevEl: prevButton,
          },
          
          on: {
            init: function () {
              const swiper = this;
              setTimeout(() => swiper.emit('resize'), 100); 
            },
            resize: function () {
              const swiper = this;
              if (window.innerWidth < 992 && swiper.slides.length > 0) {
                const containerWidth = swiper.el.clientWidth;
                const lastSlideWidth = swiper.slides[swiper.slides.length - 1].offsetWidth;
                swiper.params.slidesOffsetAfter = Math.max(0, containerWidth - lastSlideWidth);
              } else {
                swiper.params.slidesOffsetAfter = 0; 
              }
              swiper.update();
            }
          }
        });
      }
    });
  });
</script>

<style>
/* ==========================================
   1. SWIPER JS & LAYOUT FIXES
   ========================================== */

.section_case-studies {
  overflow-x: hidden !important;
  position: relative;

}

.swiper-wrapper {

  grid-row-gap: 0px !important;

  padding: 0px !important;
}

.swiper-slide {
  flex-shrink: 0 !important;
  box-sizing: border-box !important;
  height: auto;
  transform: translateZ(0);
  -webkit-transform: translateZ(0);
  backface-visibility: hidden;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

@media screen and (max-width: 479px) {
  .swiper-slide {
    width: 85vw !important; 
    min-height: 500px;
  }
}

/* ==========================================

.section_case-studies::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  right: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  width: 10vw;
  background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(13, 13, 23, 0), rgba(13, 13, 23, 1));
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 10;
}

.section_case-studies .flex-col > div:first-child {
  position: relative !important;
  z-index: 20 !important;
}

/* ==========================================
   3. CARD UI STYLES & CMS TEXT CLAMPING
   ========================================== */

/* CMS Quote Truncation + Hanging Quotes (BASE CLASS) */
.text-style-quote1 {
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 4; 
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  margin-left: -12px !important; 
  padding-left: 12px !important;
  width: calc(100% + 12px) !important; 

  max-height: 6em; 
  /* FASTER SPEED FOR WHEN THEY UNHOVER (The "Out" animation) */
  transition: max-height 0.2s ease-out;
  will-change: max-height; 
}

/* Reveal full quote on card hover (HOVER CLASS) */
.card_case-study:hover .text-style-quote1 {
  -webkit-line-clamp: 15; 
  max-height: 25em; 
  /* SLOWER SPEED FOR WHEN THEY HOVER (The "In" animation) */
  transition: max-height 0.4s ease-in-out;
}

.text-style-quote1::before { content: "“"; }
.text-style-quote1::after { content: "”"; }

/* ==========================================
   4. GRADIENTS & SOFT BLUR (Restored to your original setup)
   ========================================== */

/* BASE CLASS (Unhovered state) */
.card_case-study-gradient {
  position: absolute;
  inset: auto 0% -0.5%;
  z-index: 1;
  height: 55%;
  background-image: linear-gradient(180deg, hsla(0, 0.00%, 0.00%, 0.00), var(--core--black) 59%);
  backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
  -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0%, black 25%);
  mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0%, black 25%);

  /* Push it down slightly by default, and set the fast "Out" speed */
  transform: translateY(15%); 
  transition: transform 0.2s ease-out;
  will-change: transform;
}

@media screen and (min-width: 1440px) {
  .card_case-study-gradient {
    position: absolute;
    inset: auto 0% -1%;
    z-index: 1;
    height: 55%;
    background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(13, 13, 23, 0), rgb(13, 13, 23) 80%);
    backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
    -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0%, black 25%);
    mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0%, black 25%);
    
    /* Ensure the transform stays applied on desktop breakpoints */
    transform: translateY(15%); 
  }
}

/* HOVER CLASS (Hovered state) */
.card_case-study:hover .card_case-study-gradient {
  /* Move it back up to its original spot (0%) */
  transform: translateY(0%);
  /* Slower "In" speed to match the text expanding */
  transition: transform 0.4s ease-in-out;
}

.card_case-study-gradient2 {
  position: absolute;
  inset: auto 0% -0.5%;
  z-index: 1;
  height: 101%; /* Covers the whole image for a base dark tint */
  background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5));
}

@media screen and (min-width: 1440px) {
  .card_case-study-gradient2 {
    position: absolute;
    inset: auto 0% -1%;
    z-index: 1;
    height: 101%;
    background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(13, 13, 23, 0.5), rgba(13, 13, 23, 0.5));
    backdrop-filter: none;
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: none;
  }
}

/* ==========================================
   5. HOVER EFFECTS & PERFECT SQUARE ARROW
   ========================================== */

/* Rigid, Un-squeezable Square */
.card_case-study-arrow {
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  justify-content: center !important;
  width: 36px !important;  
  height: 36px !important; 
  flex-shrink: 0 !important; 
  padding: 0 !important; 
  box-sizing: border-box;

  transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
}

/* Hover state: Taps into your design system's gray-200 */
.card_case-study:hover .card_case-study-arrow {
  background-color: var(--gray--gray-200, #e6e6e6) !important; 
}

/* Force the specific Webflow icon class to be perfectly centered */
.card_case-study-arrow .icon-1x1-xlarge,
.card_case-study-arrow svg,
.card_case-study-arrow img { 
  display: block !important;
  margin: 0 !important;      
  padding: 0 !important;     
  position: static !important; 
  width: 16px !important;  
  height: 16px !important;
  
  /* The icon itself gets the base violet link color */
  color: #896bf5 !important;
  fill: #896bf5 !important;
  transition: color 0.3s ease, fill 0.3s ease !important;
}

/* The icon darkens to a deeper violet on hover */
.card_case-study:hover .card_case-study-arrow .icon-1x1-xlarge,
.card_case-study:hover .card_case-study-arrow svg {
  color: #6b4ce6 !important; /* Feel free to tweak this hex if you need it even darker! */
  fill: #6b4ce6 !important;
}
  
/* ==========================================
   6. NAVIGATION CONTROLS (ARROWS)
   ========================================== */

.slider_arrow-container {
  display: flex !important;
  visibility: visible !important;
  position: relative !important; 
  z-index: 20 !important; 
}

.slider-prev,
.slider-next {
  display: flex !important; 
  visibility: visible !important;
  opacity: 1 !important; 
  cursor: pointer !important;
  pointer-events: auto !important;
  transition: opacity 0.2s ease, transform 0.1s ease !important; 
}

.slider-prev:hover,
.slider-next:hover {
  opacity: 0.5 !important; 
}

.slider-prev:active,
.slider-next:active {
  transform: scale(0.95) !important;
}

.slider-prev.swiper-button-disabled,
.slider-next.swiper-button-disabled,
.slider-prev.swiper-button-lock,
.slider-next.swiper-button-lock {
  opacity: 0.3 !important; 
  pointer-events: none !important; 
  cursor: default !important; 
}

.slider-prev.swiper-button-disabled *,
.slider-next.swiper-button-disabled *,
.slider-prev.swiper-button-lock *,
.slider-next.swiper-button-lock * {
  pointer-events: none !important; 
}

/* ==========================================
   7. CMS TEXT ALIGNMENT FIXES
   ========================================== */

.testimonial-list_role.w-dyn-bind-empty + .text-inline {
  display: none !important;
}

.profile_title-and-company-wrapper .text-inline {
  margin-left: 0px !important; 
  margin-right: 4px !important; 
  align-self: baseline !important; 
}

.profile_title-and-company-wrapper {
  align-items: baseline !important;
  gap: 0px; 
}

  /* ==========================================
   8. MOBILE / TOUCH OVERRIDES (991px and below)
   ========================================== */
@media screen and (max-width: 991px) {
  
  /* 1. Force the quote to be fully expanded permanently */
  .text-style-quote1 {
    -webkit-line-clamp: 15 !important;
    max-height: 25em !important; 
  }

  /* 2. Force the gradient to stay in its raised position */
  .card_case-study-gradient {
    transform: translateY(0%) !important;
  }

  /* 3. Keep the arrow box white to signal clickability */
  .card_case-study-arrow {
    background-color: #FFFFFF !important;
  }

  /* 4. Disable the background image zoom so it doesn't get "stuck" if the user taps the card */
  .card_case-study:hover .card_case-study-background,
  .card_case-study:active .card_case-study-background {
    transform: scale(1) !important;
  }

  /* 5. Keep the icon black permanently on mobile to contrast the white background */
  .card_case-study-arrow .icon-1x1-xlarge,
  .card_case-study-arrow svg {
    color: #000000 !important;
    fill: #000000 !important;
  }
}

.ticker-horizontal {

.ticker-horizontal_content {
  display: flex;

  height: 100%;
  flex-direction: row;

}

/* NEW: Pauses the ticker if the user hovers over it with their mouse */
.ticker-horizontal:hover .ticker-horizontal_content {
  animation-play-state: paused;
}
  
@keyframes ticker {
  from { transform: translateX(0); }
  to   { transform: translateX(-50%); }
}

/* NEW: Accessibility best practice. Pauses animation for users who have motion sickness settings enabled on their OS */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .ticker-horizontal_content {
    animation-play-state: paused;
  }
}

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const tracks = document.querySelectorAll('[carousel-content]');
  if (!tracks.length) return;

  // Clone logos
  tracks.forEach(track => {
    const originals = Array.from(track.children);
    originals.forEach(el => {
      const clone = el.cloneNode(true);
      clone.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
      track.appendChild(clone);
    });
  });

  // Keep track of the initial window width
  let windowWidth = window.innerWidth;
  let resizeTimer;

  // Restart animation ONLY if the window width changes
  window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
    // Check if the current width is different from the stored width
    if (window.innerWidth !== windowWidth) {
      windowWidth = window.innerWidth; // Update the stored width
      
      clearTimeout(resizeTimer);
      resizeTimer = setTimeout(() => {
        tracks.forEach(track => {
          track.style.animation = 'none';
          track.offsetHeight; // force reflow
          track.style.animation = '';
        });
      }, 150);
    }
  });
});
